---
title: "11. AUCell of scRNA"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---
  
```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)

options(timeout = 36000)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options(download.file.method = "curl")
options(download.file.extra = "-k -L")

options(BioC_mirror = "https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/bioconductor")
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CRAN/"))
```

```{r}
# ================= 包加载 =================
library(Seurat)
library(AUCell)
library(ggplot2)

# 6个核心基因
hub6 <- c("STAT3", "HIF1A", "SERPINE1", "BCL2L1", "CDKN1A", "CASP1")

# ================= 读入单细胞数据 =================
sc <- readRDS("sc_DCM.rds")  # 你的单细胞Seurat对象

# ================= AUCell 打分 =================
gene_sets <- list(Hub6_Signature = hub6)

# 构建排名
cells_rankings <- AUCell_buildRankings(
  as.matrix(sc@assays$RNA@data),
  plotStats = FALSE
)

# 计算AUC
cells_AUC <- AUCell_calcAUC(
  geneSets = gene_sets,
  rankings = cells_rankings,
  nCores = 4
)

# 把分数加入Seurat对象
sc$Hub6_AUCell <- as.numeric(t(getAUC(cells_AUC)))

# ================= 绘图 =================
pdf("AUCell_Hub6_Score.pdf", width = 12, height = 5)

# 降维图上展示分数
p1 <- FeaturePlot(sc, features = "Hub6_AUCell", pt.size = 0.1) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colours = c("blue", "white", "red")) +
  ggtitle("6-Hub Signature AUCell Score")

# 小提琴图
p2 <- VlnPlot(sc, features = "Hub6_AUCell", pt.size = 0, fill = "orange") +
  ggtitle("")

print(p1 + p2)
dev.off()

# ================= 保存 =================
saveRDS(sc, "sc_with_Hub6_AUCell.rds")
write.csv(cells_AUC@assays@data$AUC, "Hub6_AUCell_Scores.csv")

cat("\n✅ AUCell 分析完成！\n")
```
